dict.string: LucidPal uses the microphone to let you dictate messages. Audio is processed on-device and never sent anywhere.
LucidPal uses on-device speech recognition to convert your voice to text. Nothing leaves your device.
LucidPal reads your calendar events to answer questions about your schedule. All processing happens on-device.
LucidPal needs full calendar access to read and help you manage your events. All processing happens on-device.
LucidPal reads your reminders to answer questions about your tasks and to-dos. All processing happens on-device.
LucidPal needs full reminders access to help you manage your tasks. All processing happens on-device.
LucidPal uses your location to include your city in AI responses (e.g. weather, local recommendations). Location is never stored or sent to any server.
LucidPal needs local network access to connect to your self-hosted SearXNG search instance.
